input: Given a skill.md for a code-review skill with ORPA pattern, generate test cases covering all four phases.
How do you ensure test cases cover edge cases and not just the happy path?
What makes a good set of expected_keywords for a test case?
Analyze this skill for test coverage gaps: it has 5 phases but only 3 test cases.
Predict the shadow validation success probability for a skill with vague outputs and no quality gates.
